data.name: Furry Fatale
data.detailed_description:
Furry Fatale is a thriller visual novel games with some interactive design elements.

The story happens in the span of one night in a small town when an answer to an emergency call goes awry upon meeting with three furry girls in distress.

Gameplay consists of progressing through dialogues, navigation, light puzzles and interactive features like point-and-click and drag-and-drop.

This game contains anthropomorphic/furry characters and also has strong language and sexually explicit scenes.

The explicit scenes are fully animated and interactive.

Different choices may lead to different consequences.

data.short_description: An emergency call goes awry upon meeting with three beautiful furry girls in distress. Then follows a fateful night of little games of lust, sex and deception.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-6200U CPU @ 2.30GHz 2.40 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GEFORCE 940MX
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice:
This game is a work of fiction.
Any names, organizations, locations, or events appearing in this game are fictional. Any resemblance to real names, organizations, locations, events, etc. is purely coincidental.
This game contains sexually explicit contents and it is only intended for mature audiences of ages above 18 or 21 years old depending on the jurisdiction of your state/nation. It's purchase, play and/or viewing by minors is expressly forbidden.
All characters appearing in this game are depicted as over the age of 18 years old.
